CustomField.description: Opens a view where you can mark that you have sent a "Mortgage Pre-Approval" email for ten applicants at a time.
CustomField.formula:
HYPERLINK("/ui/list/FilterEditPage?id=00B3m000005PLuP"
+"&fval1=%22"+
IF(CONTAINS(Name,"#")=TRUE, SUBSTITUTE(Name, "#", "%23"), Name)
+"%22" +"&fval2=%22Eligible%2C%20Pending%20Staff%20Action%22" +"&fval3=Pending" +"&fval4=Property%20Questionnaire" +"&fval5=False"+
"&retURL=%2Fa1I%3Ffcf%3D00B1N000005Fr8h"
, "Click Here")& IF(OR($User.LastName = "Burton",$User.LastName = "Langer",$User.LastName="Santiago",$User.LastName="Calle",$User.LastName="Membreno",$User.LastName="Peterson",$User.LastName="Sullivan",$User.LastName="Membreno",$User.LastName="Ritenband"), "..........."& HYPERLINK( "https://cgph--c.vf.force.com/flow/Outreach_Send_to_Obtain_MPA?varPropID="& Id &"&retURL=https%3A%2F%2Fcgph.lightning.force.com%2Flightning%2Fr%2FHOMEtracker__Property__c%2F"& Id &"%2Fview", "NEW","_Top"),'')
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opens a view where you can mark that you have sent a "Mortgage Pre-Approval" email for ten applicants at a time.
CustomField.label: Send Mortgage Pre-Approval Emails, O
